# `typescript-prisma`

Generates TypeScript code for projects using [Prisma](https://www.prisma.io/) as the ORM.

## Install

```bash
daxonne add typescript-prisma
```

## Generated files (per table)

| Template | Output filename | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `types.hbs` | `{Table}.ts` | TypeScript `interface` |
| `service.hbs` | `{Table}Service.ts` | Prisma client service functions |

## Example — `Customer.ts`

```typescript
// Auto-generated by Daxonne — do not edit manually

export interface Customer {
  id: number;
  firstName: string;
  lastName: string;
  email?: string;
  balance: number;
  joinedAt: Date;
}
```

- Nullable columns → optional property with `?`
- Column names are converted to `camelCase`

## Example — `CustomerService.ts`

```typescript
// Auto-generated by Daxonne — do not edit manually

import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client';
import { Customer } from './Customer';

const prisma = new PrismaClient();

export async function getAllCustomer(): Promise<Customer[]> {
  return prisma.customer.findMany();
}

export async function getCustomerById(id: number): Promise<Customer | null> {
  return prisma.customer.findUnique({ where: { id: id } });
}

export async function createCustomer(data: Omit<Customer, 'id'>): Promise<Customer> {
  return prisma.customer.create({ data });
}

export async function deleteCustomer(id: number): Promise<void> {
  await prisma.customer.delete({ where: { id: id } });
}
```

## Type mapping

| Internal type | TypeScript type |
|---|---|
| `string` | `string` |
| `int` | `number` |
| `long` | `number` |
| `decimal` | `number` |
| `bool` | `boolean` |
| `date` | `Date` |
| `datetime` | `Date` |
| `bytes` | `Uint8Array` |
| `uuid` | `string` |
